name_cn:
Diana 3-Compartment Matte Black 😊
Ultra-matte 🖤SO BLACK
A dark-themed Diana bag
The hardware and chain handle are all textured matte black
If you get tired of all-black, you can add a silk scarf to make it more romantic〰️
Just a heads up, we also include a ribbon🎀
Enough to make you look beautiful and change your mood😊
